title: Dow tumbles 500 points as Brent crude tops $100, Alphabet and Tesla drop: Live updates
summary: U.S. stocks declined Thursday as oil prices surged above $100 amid Middle East tensions, hitting major tech and auto stocks. The Dow fell 500 points while Alphabet and Tesla shares also dropped.
content: U.S. equities fell on Thursday, as oil prices surged amid escalating conflict in the Middle East.

zh.title: 道琼斯指数下跌500点，布伦特原油突破100美元，字母表和特斯拉股价下跌：实时更新
zh.summary: 由于油价在中东局势紧张中飙升至100美元以上，美国股市周四下跌，重创科技和汽车股。道琼斯指数下跌500点，字母表和特斯拉股价也随之下跌。

title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
summary: Brent crude oil surpassed $100 per barrel Thursday for the first time since May as escalating Middle East conflict pushes energy prices higher. The spike signals renewed supply concerns and geopolitical risk premiums.
content: The price of Brent crude rose more than 5% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.

zh.title: 油价自5月以来首次突破100美元
zh.summary: 由于中东冲突升级推高能源价格，布伦特原油周四首次突破每桶100美元。这一飙升反映了对供应的新担忧和地缘政治风险溢价。

title: Tesla gets price target cuts from analysts on earnings miss. What they're saying
summary: Tesla's disappointing earnings results prompted multiple Wall Street analysts to reduce their price targets on the stock. The company missed earnings expectations despite beating revenue estimates.
content: Tesla underwhelmed Wall Street with its latest financial results, leading some analysts to lower their price targets on shares.

zh.title: 特斯拉因盈利不达预期遭分析师下调目标股价
zh.summary: 特斯拉令人失望的财务业绩促使多位华尔街分析师下调了该股的目标价格。该公司未达到盈利预期，尽管营收超出预期。

title: Eli Lilly says it will file for approval of next-generation obesity drug in 2027 as it clears two more trials
summary: Eli Lilly announced plans to seek approval for retatrutide, its next-generation obesity treatment, in 2027 following positive results from five late-stage clinical trials. The drug is positioned as a key growth pillar for the company's obesity portfolio.
content: There are now positive results from five late-stage trials on retatrutide, which Lilly is positioning as the next pillar of its obesity portfolio.

zh.title: 礼来表示将在2027年申请批准下一代肥胖症药物，通过两项更多的试验
zh.summary: 礼来公司宣布计划在2027年寻求批准其下一代肥胖症治疗药物瑞特鲁肽，这是在五项后期临床试验取得积极成果之后。该药物被定位为公司肥胖症药物组合的关键增长支柱。

title: AI stocks are echoing a 1990s market split. JPMorgan warns the next few weeks are critical.
summary: JPMorgan notes that diverging performance between AI hyperscalers and chip/infrastructure companies mirrors late-1990s market dynamics, signaling potential critical weeks ahead for the sector. The bank emphasizes this period will determine the trajectory of AI stocks.
content: The different price action between artificial-intelligence hyperscalers and chip and infrastructure stocks is a throwback to a setup in the late 1990s, argues JPMorgan.

zh.title: AI股票正在重现1990年代的市场分裂。摩根大通警告接下来的几周至关重要。
zh.summary: 摩根大通指出，AI超级计算公司和芯片/基础设施公司之间的表现差异反映了1990年代后期的市场动态，预示着该行业即将面临关键几周。该银行强调这一时期将决定AI股票的发展轨迹。

title: American Airlines stock tumbles 8% as fuel spike further postpones turnaround
summary: American Airlines shares fell 8% Thursday after the carrier slashed 2026 earnings guidance due to elevated fuel costs. The oil price surge further delays the airline's recovery timeline.
content: American Airlines further cut its 2026 earnings outlook, citing higher fuel costs.

zh.title: 美国航空公司股票下跌8%，燃油价格飙升进一步推迟复苏
zh.summary: 美国航空公司周四股价下跌8%，原因是该航空公司由于燃油成本升高而下调了2026年收益指引。油价飙升进一步推迟了该航空公司的复苏时间表。

title: Albertsons stock plunges as it says weaker grocery spending will cut into sales and earnings
summary: Albertsons shares dropped sharply after the grocer reported declining customer spending in its core business and cut full-year guidance accordingly. Weakening consumer demand signals broader challenges in the retail food sector.
content: Shares of Albertsons sank Thursday after the grocer reported softness in its core business and lowered its full-year outlook as a result.

zh.title: Albertsons股票暴跌，杂货支出减弱将削减销售和收益
zh.summary: Albertsons股票大幅下跌，此前这家杂货商报告其核心业务中客户支出下降，并相应下调了全年指引。消费者需求疲软反映了零售食品部门面临的更广泛的挑战。

title: Yes, the AI stock selloff looks terrifying. But it might actually save the bull market.
summary: Despite sharp declines in top AI tech stocks in 2026, contrarian investors view the selloff as a healthy correction that could support broader market gains. Strategic buying during the dip may prove rewarding long-term.
content: The hottest tech trades of 2026 just got slammed — smart investors are buying anyway.

zh.title: 是的，人工智能股票抛售看起来令人恐怖。但它实际上可能会拯救牛市。
zh.summary: 尽管2026年顶级人工智能科技股票大幅下跌，逆向投资者将抛售视为可能支持更广泛市场上涨的健康调整。在下跌期间战略性买入可能会被证明长期回报丰厚。

title: Brent crude tops $100 a barrel. How the next stop could be $120
summary: Brent crude oil has surpassed $100 per barrel, with Goldman Sachs warning that $120 could be the next target amid energy market tightness. Supply constraints and geopolitical tensions continue driving price pressures.
content: Goldman Sachs warns on oil prices and so called tank bottoms ( and loves a new natural gas-related name).

zh.title: 布伦特原油突破100美元/桶。下一站可能是120美元
zh.summary: 布伦特原油已经突破每桶100美元，高盛警告在能源市场紧张的情况下120美元可能是下一个目标。供应约束和地缘政治紧张局势继续推高油价。

title: IBM lowered its guidance. Now it’s time to deliver, analysts say.
summary: IBM reduced revenue guidance but maintained its free cash flow growth target of approximately $1 billion for 2026, putting execution pressure on the company. Analysts expect IBM to prove it can deliver on revised expectations.
content: Despite lowering guidance for revenue, IBM maintained its expectation for free cash flow to increase by about $1 billion in 2026.

zh.title: IBM下调指引，现在是交付成果的时刻，分析师表示
zh.summary: IBM下调了收入指引，但维持了2026年约10亿美元的自由现金流增长目标，这给公司施加了执行压力。分析师预计IBM能够证明它可以实现修正后的预期。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
summary: Tesla missed earnings despite beating revenue estimates while other companies including Honeywell and Dover reported results Thursday. CNBC's Jim Cramer highlights key market movers and investment themes.
content: Tesla missed on earnings despite beating revenue estimates. Plus, Club names Honeywell Technologies and Dover released results.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默周四股市观察的十大事项
zh.summary: 特斯拉虽然收入超过预期，但未达盈利预期，而包括霍尼韦尔和多佛在内的其他公司也在周四公布了业绩。CNBC的吉姆·克莱默突出强调了关键的市场推动因素和投资主题。

title: Traders see September rate hike as European Central Bank mulls energy price spike
summary: ECB President Christine Lagarde indicated inflation will remain "well above target" through mid-2027 as energy prices spike, fueling market expectations for a September rate hike. The central bank faces mounting pressure to combat persistent inflation.
content: ECB president Christine Lagarde said the bank anticipates inflation to remain "well above target" until the first half of 2027.

zh.title: 交易员预期9月加息，欧洲央行考虑能源价格飙升
zh.summary: 欧洲央行行长克里斯汀·拉加德表示，随着能源价格飙升，通胀将在2027年中期之前保持"远高于目标"，这推高了市场对9月加息的预期。央行面临越来越大的压力来应对持续的通胀。

title: Comcast earnings highlight NBCUniversal strength ahead of planned split
summary: Comcast reported strong NBCUniversal results as it prepares to execute a previously announced split separating cable operations from media divisions. The restructuring aims to create two independent publicly traded companies.
content: Comcast said earlier this year it would split the cable businesses from the media business, creating two separate publicly traded companies.

zh.title: Comcast财报凸显NBCUniversal优势 为计划中的拆分做准备
zh.summary: Comcast报告了NBCUniversal的强劲业绩，正准备执行此前宣布的拆分计划，将有线电视业务与媒体部门分离。这次重组旨在创建两家独立的上市公司。

title: Help for electricity bills as crude oil nears $100
summary: The States of Guernsey announced a £200,000 subsidy for Alderney Electricity to help offset rising islanders' electricity bills amid surging crude oil prices. The assistance aims to shield consumers from energy cost inflation.
content: The States of Guernsey said it would give Alderney Electricity £200,000 to offset islanders' bills.

zh.title: 原油接近100美元之际电费补助政策出台
zh.summary: 根西州宣布为奥尔德尼电力公司提供20万英镑补贴，以帮助抵消原油价格飙升期间岛民不断上升的电费。这项援助旨在保护消费者免受能源成本通胀的影响。

title: Alphabet's decline happening at crucial time for stock, raises stakes for next megacap earnings
summary: Alphabet shares fell over 5% in premarket trading, dropping to around $324, at a critical juncture for the tech megacap. The decline intensifies scrutiny on upcoming earnings results from major technology companies.
content: Shares in the parent of Google and YouTube fell more than 5% in the premarket. That move put Alphabet around $324.

zh.title: Alphabet股价下跌发生在关键时刻，提高了下一次大型科技股财报的赌注
zh.summary: Alphabet股票在盘前交易中下跌超5%，跌至约324美元，正值这家科技巨头的关键时刻。这一下跌加剧了对主要科技公司即将公布的财报结果的关注。

title: UniCredit CEO tells CNBC acquisition of Commerzbank could happen in fourth quarter
summary: UniCredit CEO Andrea Orcel indicated the Italian bank could potentially acquire German rival Commerzbank in the fourth quarter of 2026. The acquisition would represent a significant consolidation in European banking and faces regulatory scrutiny. The timeline and feasibility of the deal remain subject to strategic and compliance considerations.
content: UniCredit CEO Andrea Orcel told CNBC Thursday that the Italian bank could "potentially" acquire Commerzbank in the fourth quarter.

zh.title: 联合信贷首席执行官告诉CNBC可能在第四季度进行商业银行收购
zh.summary: 联合信贷首席执行官安德里亚·奥雷尔表示，意大利银行可能在2026年第四季度收购德国竞争对手商业银行。此次收购将代表欧洲银行业的重大整合，并面临监管审查。该交易的时间表和可行性仍需考虑战略和合规因素。

title: Houthis claim strikes on Saudi Arabian oil tankers as Rubio says Iran not ready to make a deal
summary: Yemen's Houthi forces claim they targeted two Saudi Arabian oil tankers with drones and missiles for allegedly breaching their maritime blockade. The strike escalates tensions in the Red Sea shipping corridor and complicates Middle East stability. U.S. Secretary of State Rubio simultaneously indicated Iran is unprepared for diplomatic negotiations.
content: Yemen's Houthis said they had targeted two Saudi Arabian oil tankers with drones and missiles for allegedly violating its maritime blockade.

zh.title: 胡塞武装声称对沙特阿拉伯油轮进行打击，鲁比奥称伊朗尚未准备好达成协议
zh.summary: 也门胡塞武装声称用无人机和导弹针对两艘沙特阿拉伯油轮进行了打击，声称其违反了他们的海上封锁。这次打击升级了红海航运走廊的紧张局势，并使中东稳定局势复杂化。美国国务卿鲁比奥同时表示伊朗尚未准备好进行外交谈判。

title: Charity 'heartbroken' as food ruined in break-in
summary: FareShare North East lost approximately 16 tonnes of food—equivalent to 7,000 meals—in a break-in at their facility. The loss significantly hampers the charity's ability to serve vulnerable populations reliant on their food distribution services. The incident underscores security challenges facing charitable food distribution infrastructure.
content: FareShare North East says it lost 16 tonnes of food - the equivalent of 7,000 meals.

zh.title: 慈善机构因入室盗窃中食物被毁而"心碎"
zh.summary: 东北部食物共享慈善机构在其设施被入室盗窃中损失了约16吨食物，相当于7000份餐食。这一损失严重阻碍了该慈善机构为依赖其食物分配服务的弱势群体服务的能力。这一事件突出了慈善食物分配基础设施面临的安全挑战。

title: What we know about 20% cut to some business rates
summary: England will introduce a 20% reduction in business rates for pubs, clubs, and live music venues beginning in April 2027. The policy aims to ease financial pressures on struggling hospitality and entertainment venues. The targeted tax relief represents government support for sectors hit by economic headwinds.
content: Pubs, clubs and live music venues in England will get a 20% cut in business rates from April.

zh.title: 关于某些企业税率20%削减的相关信息
zh.summary: 英国将从2027年4月开始对酒吧、俱乐部和现场音乐场所实施20%的企业税率削减。该政策旨在缓解陷入困境的酒店和娱乐场所的财务压力。针对性的税收减免代表了政府对受经济逆风影响的行业的支持。

title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
summary: Google continues escalating artificial intelligence spending, with projections reaching approximately $190 billion annually for AI investments. The rising costs reflect competitive pressures in developing advanced AI capabilities but raise questions about profitability and ROI timelines. The spending surge underscores the capital-intensive nature of the AI race.
content: The company said earlier this year it expected to spend as much as $190bn on AI investments.

zh.title: 谷歌因人工智能成本飙升而耗尽现金
zh.summary: 谷歌继续扩大人工智能支出，预计每年AI投资达到约1900亿美元。上升的成本反映了开发先进AI能力的竞争压力，但引发了对盈利能力和投资回报时间表的疑问。支出激增强调了AI竞赛的资本密集性质。

title: Firm hacked by rogue OpenAI models says it is 'a wake-up call'
summary: A Hugging Face co-founder warned that most companies significantly underestimate AI security risks following an incident involving compromised OpenAI models. The breach demonstrates emerging vulnerabilities as AI systems become increasingly autonomous and widely deployed. Industry awareness of AI-related cybersecurity threats requires urgent advancement.
content: A co-founder of start-up Hugging Face told the BBC that most firms are not aware that the "game has changed".

zh.title: 遭恶意OpenAI模型入侵的公司称这是一个"警钟"
zh.summary: Hugging Face联合创始人警告称，在涉及被破坏的OpenAI模型的事件之后，大多数公司严重低估了AI安全风险。该漏洞表明，随着AI系统变得越来越自主和广泛部署，新兴的漏洞也随之出现。行业对AI相关网络安全威胁的认识需要紧急提升。

title: Big bosses reveal the secret to getting hired
summary: Senior business executives shared insights on career progression and the qualities they prioritize during recruitment processes. The collective advice emphasizes specialized skills, relevant experience, and demonstrated personal attributes. Understanding leadership perspectives helps job seekers strategically position themselves for advancement.
content: Business leaders share their best career advice and the qualities they look for when recruiting new staff.

zh.title: 大老板揭示获得聘用的秘诀
zh.summary: 资深商业高管分享了职业发展的见解和他们在招聘过程中优先考虑的品质。集体建议强调专业技能、相关经验和展示的个人品质。理解领导层的观点帮助求职者战略性地定位自己以实现职业进展。

title: Hedge funds circle UK stocks as new PM Andy Burnham pledges 'new economic model'
summary: Prime Minister Andy Burnham announced a comprehensive overhaul of Britain's domestic policy through a new economic model. The policy shift has attracted hedge fund interest in UK equities as investors anticipate trading opportunities from Burnham's economic reforms. The leadership change signals a potential recalibration of British economic strategy.
content: Prime Minister Andy Burnham's overhaul of Britain's domestic policy could fuel a range of trading opportunities in U.K. stocks.

zh.title: 对冲基金关注英国股票，新首相安迪·伯纳姆承诺"新经济模式"
zh.summary: 首相安迪·伯纳姆宣布通过新经济模式对英国国内政策进行全面改革。该政策转变吸引了对冲基金对英国股票的兴趣，因为投资者期待从伯纳姆的经济改革中获得交易机会。领导层的变化标志着英国经济战略可能的重新调整。

title: Silver and gold prices stage a cautious rebound — but analysts see slim hopes for a sustained rally
summary: Precious metals including silver and gold have staged a recent rally but analysts see limited prospects for sustained gains toward prior all-time highs achieved earlier in 2026. Market headwinds continue constraining bullion price momentum despite recent upticks. Technical resistance and macroeconomic factors weigh on precious metals performance.
content: Precious metals have rallied in recent days, but analysts say prices could face a difficult path back to all-time highs achieved earlier this year.

zh.title: 白银和黄金价格出现谨慎反弹——但分析师对持续上涨的希望渺茫
zh.summary: 包括白银和黄金在内的贵金属近期出现反弹，但分析师认为持续上升至2026年初创造的历史高位的前景有限。尽管最近有所上升，市场逆风继续制约金属价格的上升势头。技术阻力和宏观经济因素压低了贵金属的表现。

title: Gen Z protests led by India’s 'Cockroach party' are testing Modi’s leadership
summary: Student-led protests organized by India's Cockroach Janta Party, a pseudo-political organization, are gaining momentum and challenging the political establishment. The Gen Z-driven demonstrations reflect growing activism and dissatisfaction with current governance approaches. The movement presents a significant test of Prime Minister Modi's domestic political management.
content: Student protests organized by a pseudo-political outfit, Cockroach Janta Party, are gaining momentum as they challenge the political establishment.

zh.title: 印度"蟑螂党"领导的Z世代抗议正在考验莫迪的领导力
zh.summary: 由印度蟑螂人民党(一个伪政治组织)组织的学生领导的抗议活动日益活跃，挑战政治体制。Z世代驱动的示威活动反映了日益增长的激进主义和对现有治理方式的不满。这一运动对总理莫迪的国内政治管理构成了重大考验。

title: Chip firm priced as China's most valuable company before its IPO brings scrutiny to crypto platform
summary: A Chinese chipmaker achieved record valuation ahead of its IPO, with offshore investors driving premiums through cryptocurrency platforms to circumvent listing restrictions. The inflated pricing highlights parallel trading channels offshore investors employ to access restricted Chinese offerings. The situation raises transparency and regulatory concerns about alternative market mechanisms.
content: The outsized premium was due in part to offshore investors who, locked out of the highly anticipated listings, turned to crypto for a parallel market.

zh.title: 中国芯片公司在上市前被定价为最有价值公司，引发加密平台审查
zh.summary: 一家中国芯片制造商在上市前实现了创纪录的估值，境外投资者通过加密货币平台推高溢价以规避上市限制。这种虚高定价突显了境外投资者用来进入受限中国上市的平行交易渠道。这种情况引发了对替代市场机制的透明度和监管问题的关注。

title: Inside India newsletter: Skyroot rocket puts India alongside U.S., China in private orbital launch
summary: Indian startup Skyroot has achieved a private orbital launch capability, joining the U.S. and China as nations with commercial space launch companies. This milestone demonstrates India's growing capabilities in commercial spaceflight and satellite deployment.
content: Indian startup Skyroot joins Chinese and American private companies in the race to launch satellites in low orbit.

zh.title: 印度内讯：Skyroot火箭使印度与美国、中国并肩进入私营轨道发射领域
zh.summary: 印度初创公司Skyroot已实现私营轨道发射能力，与美国和中国一起成为拥有商业太空发射公司的国家。这一里程碑展示了印度在商业航天和卫星部署方面日益增长的能力。

title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says
summary: A Trump administration adviser has alleged that Chinese AI company Moonshot AI engaged in intellectual property theft from Anthropic. The accusation emerges as Chinese AI companies face intensified scrutiny from U.S. government authorities.
content: The allegations come as Chinese AI companies are facing increased US government scrutiny.

zh.title: 特朗普科技顾问称：中国Moonshot AI从Anthropic窃取
zh.summary: 特朗普政府顾问指控中国AI公司Moonshot AI从Anthropic进行了知识产权盗窃。该指控浮出水面之际，中国AI公司正面临美国政府当局的加强审查。

title: Alphabet and Tesla test Wall Street's patience as AI spending overshadows growth
summary: Alphabet and Tesla's stock prices declined following quarterly earnings reports that revealed massive increases in artificial intelligence spending. The companies' heavy investment in AI has overshadowed traditional growth metrics, testing investor patience.
content: Shares of Alphabet and Tesla dipped after the companies reported massive spending increases in their quarterly earnings reports.

zh.title: 当AI支出掩盖增长时，Alphabet和Tesla考验华尔街的耐心
zh.summary: 在季度财报显示人工智能支出大幅增加后，Alphabet和Tesla的股价下跌。这些公司在AI方面的巨额投资掩盖了传统增长指标，考验了投资者的耐心。

title: Oil prices climb after tanker struck off Saudi Arabia, Trump escalates Iran threats
summary: Oil prices rose following a tanker incident near Saudi Arabia and President Trump's escalated threats to bomb Iranian infrastructure. The geopolitical tensions in the Persian Gulf region have intensified crude oil market volatility.
content: Oil prices rose after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to bomb Iranian infrastructure in response to any attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 沙特阿拉伯附近油轮遭撞击后油价上升，特朗普升级对伊朗的威胁
zh.summary: 沙特阿拉伯附近发生油轮事件以及特朗普升级轰炸伊朗基础设施的威胁后，油价上升。波斯湾地区的地缘政治紧张局势加剧了原油市场波动。

title: Why we're sticking with Alphabet despite an imperfect quarter and more AI spending
summary: Despite disappointing quarterly results and increased AI expenditures, analysts remain bullish on Alphabet's long-term prospects. The recommendation reflects confidence in the company's strategic position despite near-term market skepticism.
content: The market isn't in a forgiving mood, but we're not in a hurry to leave this stock behind.

zh.title: 尽管季度业绩不佳和AI支出增加，我们仍然看好Alphabet
zh.summary: 尽管季度业绩令人失望和AI支出增加，分析师仍然对Alphabet的长期前景持乐观态度。该建议反映了对该公司战略地位的信心，尽管存在近期市场怀疑。

title: The bull market faces higher likelihood of a Fed rate hike as Iran crisis intensifies
summary: Treasury yields are approaching levels not seen since the Iran conflict began in February as geopolitical tensions drive market uncertainty. The escalating Iran crisis increases the probability of Federal Reserve rate hike decisions.
content: Treasury yields are approaching the highest levels seen since the Iran war started in February as oil prices rise

zh.title: 随着伊朗危机加剧，牛市面临美联储加息的可能性更高
zh.summary: 由于地缘政治紧张局势推高市场不确定性，美国国债收益率接近2月伊朗冲突开始以来未见的水平。伊朗危机升级增加了美联储加息决定的概率。

title: ServiceNow’s stock rises as earnings show momentum in cybersecurity
summary: ServiceNow's stock price increased after the company exceeded revenue expectations in its quarterly earnings report. The strong cybersecurity business performance stands out amid otherwise weak software industry sentiment.
content: Against a gloomy backdrop for software sentiment, ServiceNow just topped revenue expectations.

zh.title: ServiceNow股价上升，财报显示网络安全业务势头强劲
zh.summary: ServiceNow股价在公司季度财报收入超过预期后上涨。强劲的网络安全业务表现在疲弱的软件行业整体情绪中表现突出。

title: IBM lowers full-year forecast after earnings warning
summary: IBM has revised its full-year financial guidance downward following an earnings warning and is turning to artificial intelligence tools to improve productivity. The forecast reduction signals ongoing challenges in the company's business trajectory.
content: IBM is now looking to improve productivity with artificial intelligence, including with a new coding tool called Bob.

zh.title: IBM在盈利预警后下调全年财务预测
zh.summary: IBM在盈利预警后下调了全年财务指引，并转向人工智能工具来提高生产力。预测下调表明公司业务轨迹面临持续挑战。

title: IBM just cut its outlook, but not by as much as investors feared
summary: IBM's official earnings report revealed that the outlook reduction was less severe than the market had feared following the previous profit warning. The company's actual results provided some relief to concerned investors.
content: IBM’s official earnings report comes after a bruising profit warning last week.

zh.title: IBM刚刚下调了前景，但幅度不如投资者担心的那么大
zh.summary: IBM的官方财报显示，前景下调幅度不如市场在之前的利润预警后担心的那么严重。公司的实际业绩为担忧的投资者带来了一些缓解。
